title: Croatian Sausage Skewers
description: A gluten-free recipe featuring Croatian sausages, perfect for a quick and flavorful meal.

ingredients.name: Croatian sausages
ingredients.notes: Make sure to choose gluten-free sausages

ingredients.name: Vegetables of your choice
ingredients.notes: Bell peppers, onions, cherry tomatoes, and mushrooms work well

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Soak the skewers in water for at least 30 minutes to prevent burning.
Thread the Croatian sausages and vegetables onto the skewers.
Brush the skewers with olive oil.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Note: Make sure to cook the sausages to an internal temperature of 160°F (71°C) to ensure food safety.
